statement: For every target-class system and admissible machinery-closed fully faithful representation preserving commitment equivalence, if dependency queries are registered, then a recoverable typed dependency relation exists over represented commitments and operations.
witness_requirements: edge endpoints resolve to represented identities
each edge has explicit temporal scope
edge identity and kind are stable under frozen equivalence
all decoders, graph stores, indexes, reason extractors, and oracles are charged to machinery closure
at least one support or defeat edge exists
anti_trivialization: a flat set of commitments is not dependency structure
hidden external graphs or reason services are inadmissible
failure may not be collapsed into Unknown
countermodels: same commitments with different support graphs
same outputs with one defeating dependency removed
temporally ordered events without operational dependence
unknown dependency answer reported as absence
claim_boundary: Operational relative necessity only; no unrestricted metaphysical claim that every relation is an objective dependency.
